items.name_cn:
【Elephant Green❤ Large】
Dior book tote shopping bag
Inspired by Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote is a flagship piece embodying Dior's aesthetic. It holds various daily essentials, featuring a fresh interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery for a stylish look. The front is adorned with the "Christian Dior" signature, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Style: 1286
Size: 42×35×18.5cm

Dior Mini Book tote

items.name_en: Dior❤ 30 MONTAIGNE HOBO AVENUE Mini Bag "Woven"
items.name_cn:
Dior❤ 30 MONTAIGNE HOBO AVENUE Mini Bag "Woven"
This Hobo Avenue mini bag is a new arrival from the Fall 2023 Ready-to-Wear collection, enriching the 30 Montaigne line with a vintage charm. Crafted from natural-colored natural grass, it features a woven pattern and comes with two detachable pouches for practical versatility. The elegant design features a leather and chain strap finished with matching enamel CD links. It can be worn on the shoulder, adding a finishing touch to various looks this season.
Front featuring matching enamel CD logo
Spacious compartment
2 detachable pouches, one with a zip closure and 3 card slots
Chain strap section finished with matching enamel CD links
Model: 2366
Size: 21×13×5cm

items.name_cn:
CD ❣❣️️ SIGNATURE Oval Camera Bag
This CD Signature oval camera bag is a new arrival from the Fall 2023 Ready-to-Wear collection, presented by Maria Grazia Chiuri, blending practical design with Dior's modern spirit. Crafted from white calfskin, it features a distinctive CD embossed logo on the front, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship. The spacious compartment features three internal card slots and a double-zip closure. It comes with a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable chain strap with leather detailing, allowing it to be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal daily companion.
Front featuring CD embossed logo
Spacious internal compartment
Double-zip closure with zip pull
Detachable, adjustable chain strap with leather detailing
Leather handle
3 card slots
Model: 1293
Size: 18*6*11cm

specs.rawTitle:
CD ❣❣️️ SIGNATURE Oval Camera Bag

items.name_en: Dior❤ Medium Travel Nomad Clutch "Blue Canvas + Strap"
items.name_cn:
Dior❤ Medium Travel Nomad Clutch "Blue Canvas + Strap"
This season's new clutch bag fuses multiple elements, making it a stylish statement piece. Crafted from classic Oblique print! It features a spacious, flexible design that can hold a mobile phone and various small daily items. It is easy to carry by hand or on the shoulder, with metal rings on the sides and a matching leather strap, which can be paired with a Dior embroidered shoulder strap.
Fits various iPhone models and wallets
Size: 22×13×9.5cm
Model: 5554

items.name_cn:
Dior New Tote ❤ Small
This bag embodies Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Crafted from fine calfskin, it features a classic quilted pattern with a signature large diamond quilting. The elegant design is timeless. The handles are adjustable in length and adorned with a detachable gunmetal DIOR letter. Lined with velvet, it includes a zip pocket and a slip pocket. The side metal clasp can connect the two straps to change the bag's shape, while the long strap can be threaded through the metal ring on the other side to bring the two sides closer together. Stylish and chic!
Model: 1188
Size: 30×36×15cm
